name: Lade's Sandbox
detailed_description:
Notice!

This game is not fully finished and tested yet, lacking contents and having bugs


About the Game

The main content of this game: .Building scenes and structures .Creating character and animations .Character and scenes interaction This game has: .Customizable world with unlimited size .Character with customizable appearance and animation .Physic-based movement and destruction .Ray-tracing-baed global illumination This game has not (yet): .Original characters .Storys and missions .Levels and challenges .Collections and achievements This game lacks (yet): .Music and sound effects .Art
about_the_game:
The main content of this game:
.Building scenes and structures
.Creating character and animations
.Character and scenes interaction

This game has:
.Customizable world with unlimited size
.Character with customizable appearance and animation
.Physic-based movement and destruction
.Ray-tracing-baed global illumination

This game has not (yet):
.Original characters
.Storys and missions
.Levels and challenges
.Collections and achievements

This game lacks (yet):
.Music and sound effects
.Art
supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
